hero.title: We Build Digital Systems
hero.subtitle: No templates. No generic solutions. Every project starts with a deep understanding of your business, then we build the perfect system that drives growth.

whyUs.title: We Don't Just Build Websites
whyUs.subtitle: Every system we build is designed specifically for your business nature, audience, and goals
whyUs.card1Desc: No ready-made templates. Every detail is designed based on your identity and target audience.
whyUs.card2Desc: Before any line of code, we sit with you to understand your field, customers, and goals.
whyUs.card3Desc: We build bookings, menus, stores, and complete systems — not just static pages.
whyUs.card4Desc: Every project is ready to scale — whether you're starting or expanding in the market.

services.title: Everything Your Business
services.subtitle: We offer complete digital solutions for every type of business
services.s1Desc: Bring your business to the digital world with a professional page that reflects your identity.
services.s2Desc: Optimized pages that attract customers and convert them into sales.
services.s3Desc: Display your products or services in an elegant and interactive way.
services.s4Desc: Book appointments smartly — for barbers, clinics, trainers and more.
services.s5Desc: Manage reservations professionally with automatic confirmations.
services.s6Desc: Sell your products online with a store customized for your brand.
services.s7Desc: Complex systems fully customized to your unique needs.
services.s8Desc: Custom iOS and Android apps built specifically for your business.

work.title: Projects We're
work.subtitle: Over {count} projects delivered to clients across various sectors

pricing.title: Plans That Fit
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits your project size — always customizable
pricing.plan1Desc: Perfect for startups and simple projects
pricing.plan2Desc: For growing businesses with advanced requirements
pricing.plan3Desc: For companies and complex large-scale systems
pricing.ownershipQuestion: Need full platform or app ownership?

story.title: Built with
story.p1: DevLens was born from a simple belief: every business deserves a digital presence that reflects its true value. No templates. No copycat designs.
story.p2: We work with shop owners, barbers, clinics, startups — anyone who believes digital evolution is a necessity, not a luxury.
story.p3: Every project we handle is treated as if it were our own. We understand, plan, execute — to world-class standards with a local touch.

contact.title: Ready to
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll reach out within 24 hours
contact.name: Full Name
contact.successMsg: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours.
contact.promiseDesc: We reply to every inquiry within 24 hours. No ghosting, no delays.

footer.tagline: Building custom digital systems for every business
